title: abutilon polyanthon
intro: Abutilon polyanthon, also known as the flowering maple or Mexican thorn apple, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's leaves and roots are said to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Abutilon polyanthon are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or oil, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
